name: Deer Backstrap
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the venison backstrap lengthwise into 3 equal strips.
2. Season each strip to taste with salt, pepper, and garlic powder.
3. Roll up each strip of seasoned backstrap.
4. Wrap each rolled strip tightly with a slice of bacon.
5. Secure the bacon-wrapped backstrap with a toothpick.
6. Grill the bacon-wrapped portions over coals until desired doneness is reached (rare).
7. Remove from heat and serve.
